pages.full_text:
perfectly. We are stopping off with papers for the Chad accountant at Alcester on the way home.
__Monday October 16th__
Eve caught an Uber to Chad, cleared the loo & we set off for supper with Charles & Jenny. Stopped off at Aldi for dog's food.
pages.notes: Text at top of page continues from previous spread (no top-of-page handwritten number visible on left page). 'Chad' appears to be a place name or abbreviated place name (possibly Chaddesley Corbett or similar). 'Monday October 16th' fell on a Monday in 2006 and 2017 within the volume's range; the mention of 'Uber' (not available in UK until 2012) makes 2017 more likely.
Page is blank apart from the handwritten page number 116 in the top-right corner and the printed wheat/laurel decoration at the bottom. Gutter overlap text belongs to left page.
